bead.title: artifacts: TD-NNN artifact search semantics (title→path→description→frontmatter→body)
bead.description: Author TD documenting artifact search semantics: scope progression (title → path → description → frontmatter → body), size caps, binary skip, perf benchmark. Body search gated on this TD's recommendations.
bead.acceptance: 1. docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-<NNN>-artifact-search.md exists. 2. Defines scope, size caps, binary handling, perf budget. 3. ddx doc audit clean.
